$comment: Project-shared settings (portable; travels with the hub). Personal permissions live in settings.local.json. The hook below is the mechanical half of Tanner's tworkflow 40% context rule (docs/workflow/07-context-hygiene.md): it injects a one-line nudge the first time context usage crosses 40% (and again each +10% band), so a long session reminds the agent to checkpoint. Fail-silent; needs `python` on PATH. Remove this hooks block to disable.
